calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Continued To Jul-18-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To Jun-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: George McNitt for Latonya Rogers (Petitioner)

The Court noted that this is an 850 Petition to Confirm Trust Assets to real properties listed on Schedule A to the Trust, but the block/lot #s do not correspond with the Deed which does not have the property addresses, and needs evidence that these specific properties are the one referenced to in the Trust. Counsel presented oral argument with regard to the legal description of the properties on the Joint Tenancy Deeds, stating that the block/lot #s are reversed without proper identification on the Nov. 1979 deed for the 1379-1381 Palou properties, and there are no numbers listed for the 1310 Palou property, for which he can provide a supplemental declaration. Mr. McNitt inquired about the issue of notice raised in the Probate Examiner's notes, stating that he thinks he can give notice under section code 16 071.5, and argued that personal service is not required. The Court noted that notice under code section 17 203 b should have been given to Rashonda who is entitled to contest if she wants, and the issue is not the validity of the Trust, but whether the property is an asset of the Trust or the Estate. The Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets is continued to June 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for petitioner to provide proper notice and include supplemental information regarding the properties.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
